title: pilosella notha
intro: Pilosella notha, also known as False Rose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Pilosella notha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Pilosella notha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for their medicinal purposes.
